name: fetch-frequency contract: the grammar applies symmetrically across the standards, pr-corpus, and compliance registries
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/validate-fetch-frequency.sh" --value daily --registry standards; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/validate-fetch-frequency.sh" --value daily --registry pr-corpus; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/validate-fetch-frequency.sh" --value daily --registry compliance
